summary: BLOCK 476 Value Recovery Engine tested successfully. All backend endpoints working (POST /api/valuation/recovery/start, GET /api/valuation/recovery/status). Frontend TreasuryHeader shows 'Recover Values' button when unvalued records exist. Recovery triggers correctly with toast confirmation. Nightly scheduler registered in server.py startup.

context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 476 Value Recovery Engine fully verified. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_block476_value_recovery.py. Recovery endpoints: POST /api/valuation/recovery/start (triggers background recovery), GET /api/valuation/recovery/status (returns {status, total, valued, recovered, failed}). Frontend shows 'Recover Values' button in TreasuryHeader when totalCount > valuedCount. Recovery progress badge (data-testid='recovery-progress-badge') appears during active recovery.
